MINI MINUTES: Judge Ronald Evans Quidachay; Clerk: D. Hakewill/M. Smith; Not Reported. (D501)

Appearances:
Plaintiff Lily Gunabe is present.
Attorney Lien Lac Uy appearing for the plaintiff.
Defendant Joseph Cuares is present.
Attorney Megan Kiefer representing the defendant through limited scope.

The Judge Karnow, litigants and counsel meet and confer in Dept. 608, for settlement discussions.

This case settled. The parties enter into a signed agreement, which was NOT filed.

The trial date of FEB-14-2012 is vacated.
